comment: Canonical list of upcoming forcing functions. The classifier reads this to bias dispatch decisions. Update when a new commitment lands; remove or mark `state:completed` when shipped.

functions.label: CIS MV1 — first mic-to-Bluesky publish
functions.biasInstruction: Prioritize same-day Bluesky publishes for voice memos. Mic-to-publish workflow live.

functions.label: NLDigital workshop
functions.biasInstruction: Lift LinkedIn AI Architect content frequency in the 5 days before. Newsletter feature this week. Generate post-workshop debrief content same-day.

functions.label: Madrid workshop
functions.biasInstruction: Spanish-market LinkedIn variant if the audience warrants. Podcast episode candidate post-event.

functions.label: Spotify weekly album drop
functions.biasInstruction: Every Friday: new cover (NB2) + Instagram carousel + optional cinematic visualizer (Higgsfield). Music-producer leads.

functions.label: AI Architect Newsletter weekly send
functions.biasInstruction: Sunday morning send. Sections: one big idea + 3 short notes + tool of the week. Pull from week's prose-producer outputs.

functions.label: Build First AI Agent funnel public
functions.biasInstruction: 5-tier premium funnel launch. Screen-producer content tied to Toolkit + Mastery + Architect tiers. SE archetype heavy.

functions.label: Investment Intelligence System OSS publish
functions.biasInstruction: GitHub repo publication. Tutorial + README via screen-producer. Long-form blog from voice memos via audio-producer.

functions.label: Library OS depth wave 3
functions.biasInstruction: 5-book deep-dive batch on frankx.ai/library. Each book ships with paired LinkedIn carousel + IG quote-card.
